arts.ttl: Team News: Newcastle United vs. Ipswich Town injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Newcastle United and Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Newcastle injury news: Eddie Howe on pneumonia recovery, issues Fabian Schar, Sven Botman update before Ipswich clash
arts.sum: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe issues an update on his health after recovering from pneumonia and also provides an injury update on Fabian Schar and Sven Botman before Saturday's Premier League clash with Ipswich.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United’s Striker Dilemma Amid Liam Delap Interest
arts.sum: Newcastle United is looking at signing a new striker this summer, with Ipswich Town’s Liam Delap the latest to be linked with a transfer to St James’ Park.
